settings.copyrightAutoExplanation: Copyright protection is automatically enabled by the system for accounts that produce proper and original content.
settings.copyrightConditionsIntro: Accounts that meet the following conditions automatically get copyright protection:
settings.copyrightCond2: Be a content creator on the platform for a certain period
settings.copyrightCond3: Publish a sufficient number of posts
settings.copyrightCond5: Don't commit copyright infringement, don't share copied content
settings.copyrightConditionsFooter: Once the conditions are met, the system automatically activates your copyright protection in the next evaluation. Once activated, it remains active. If you don't want to wait, you can request direct access by filling out the form below.

settings.copyrightAutoDesc: Activated through automatic or company application

settings.freezeWhyQuestion: Why do you want to freeze?
settings.freezeReason1: I want to take a break
settings.freezeReason4: I am considering deleting my account
settings.freezeInfo1: Your profile becomes invisible to other users
settings.freezeInfo2: Your posts are removed from explore
settings.freezeInfo4: You can reactivate anytime by logging in
settings.freezeLimitNote: You can freeze your account up to 2 times per month. Please try again later.
settings.freezeFailed: Account could not be frozen, please try again later
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Deleting your account is irreversible. Please read the information below carefully.
settings.deleteWhyQuestion: Why do you want to delete?
settings.deleteReason1: I no longer use the platform
settings.deleteReason4: I am not satisfied with the content
settings.deleteWarning1: Your account is not deleted immediately, it is put on hold for 14 days.
settings.deleteWarning2: You can cancel the deletion by logging in within 14 days.
settings.deleteWarning3: After 14 days, all your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteWarning4: Posts, comments, followers, tokens will all be deleted.
settings.healthScoreHealthy: Your account is in good health. Continue to follow community guidelines.
settings.healthScoreMedium: Your account is moderate. You can improve your score by following the rules.
settings.healthScoreRisk: Your account is at risk. It is strongly recommended to follow community guidelines.
settings.healthScoreExplanation: Feedim aims to build a respectful and safe community. The algorithm considers many factors including content quality, community engagement, account reliability, and compliance with rules. Make sure your information is accurate, avoid overusing certain features, and be respectful to other users. Feedim tracks all your activity and determines your profile score based on all your behavior. To keep your account healthy, follow community guidelines and be a valuable member.
settings.healthLearnMore: Learn more about the profile score system
settings.healthScoreSpam: Your account may have been flagged as spam. You can improve your score by following community guidelines.
settings.healthNsfwDesc: Sharing adult content that violates community guidelines
settings.healthSpamDesc: Repetitive, misleading or unwanted content sharing
settings.healthRule1: Violations are detected by Feedim AI and sent to the moderation team.
settings.healthRule2: After moderator approval, a strike is added to the relevant category.
settings.healthRule3: You can avoid strikes by following community guidelines.
settings.locationNotSupported: Your browser does not support geolocation

metadata.title: Feedim | Discover and Share
metadata.description: Write inspiring content, share videos, explore different perspectives and share your ideas with the world on Feedim.
metadata.ogDescription: Write inspiring content, share videos, explore different perspectives and share your ideas with the world.
metadata.siteDescription: Discover and Share - Content and video platform
metadata.homeDescription: Discover inspiring content, watch videos, share your thoughts and set the agenda.
metadata.authDescription: Sign in to your Feedim account or create a new account.
metadata.premiumDescription: Ad-free experience, verified badge, analytics panel and more with Feedim Premium. Discover Super, Pro, Max and Business plans.
metadata.premiumShortDescription: Ad-free experience, verified badge, analytics panel and more with Feedim Premium.
metadata.premiumKeywords: feedim premium, premium membership, verified badge, ad-free
metadata.momentsDescription: Short video content, moments and highlights.
metadata.exploreDescription: Discover popular content, trends and new authors.

emails.footerSentBy: This email was sent by Feedim.
emails.welcomeBody: We're happy you joined the Feedim family. Write your content and earn tokens thanks to premium readers.

premium.premiumCta: Get a verified badge, ad-free experience, analytics panel and much more by going Premium.
premium.planSubtitleStarter: Ad-free experience, increased limits and extra security.
premium.planSubtitlePro: Verified badge, analytics panel, monetization and more.
premium.planSubtitleMax: All features, full control, unlimited experience.
premium.planSubtitleBusiness: Fully-equipped professional package for brands and businesses.
premium.featureAdFreeDesc: Seamless experience without ads in content feed
premium.featureMoreFollowsDesc: Your daily follow limit is expanded with increased limits
premium.featureMoreLikesDesc: Your daily like limit is expanded with increased limits
premium.featureMoreCommentsDesc: Your daily comment limit is expanded with increased limits
premium.feature2FADesc: Protect your account with an additional security layer
premium.featureVerifiedBadgeDesc: Show your trustworthiness with a tick badge on your profile
premium.featureMonetizationDesc: Start creating content after becoming a Pro, Max, or Business member. Earn Coins automatically based on reading time for posts and watch time for videos, then convert to cash.
premium.featureHighlightedCommentsDesc: Your comments are highlighted with a verified badge and shown at the top
premium.featureAnalyticsDesc: Track your views, engagement and follower growth in detail
premium.featureExplorePriorityDesc: Your posts are shown higher in the explore feed
premium.featureSearchPriorityDesc: Your account is listed higher in search results
premium.featureSuggestionPriorityDesc: You appear more in user suggestions and follow lists
premium.featureProfileVisitorsDesc: See who has visited your profile
premium.featureLongCommentDesc: You can write longer comments than standard
premium.featureLongPostDesc: You can share much longer content than standard
premium.featureMultipleLinksDesc: You can add multiple links to your profile
premium.featureEarlyAccessDesc: Priority access to new features and updates
premium.featurePrioritySupportDesc: Get faster solutions with the priority support team for your issues
premium.featureFastReviewDesc: Your posts are prioritized in the moderation process
premium.featureBusinessAccountDesc: Permission to switch to business account type, contact info and category. Exclusive to Business plan.
premium.featureContactInfoDesc: You can add contact info like email and phone to your profile
premium.faqCancelQ: Can I cancel my Premium membership?
premium.faqCancelA: Yes, you can cancel anytime from the settings page. Your premium features remain active until the end of the period.
premium.faqSwitchPlanA: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade between plans. When you upgrade, the difference is charged; when you downgrade, the change takes effect at the end of the period.
premium.faqEarnA: After becoming a Pro, Max, or Business member and starting to create content, you automatically earn Coins based on reading time when Premium readers read your posts, and based on watch time when they watch your videos. The reader must spend a certain amount of time and read/watch a sufficient portion of the content. You can convert your coins to real money.
premium.faqWithdrawQ: How do I withdraw my earnings?
premium.faqWithdrawA: You can submit a withdrawal request from the Monetization section in settings. Payments are made to your bank account or card.
premium.faqBadgeA: The verified badge is the verification mark shown on profiles of Premium subscribers. It indicates that you are a verified and trusted member.
premium.faqLimitsA: Premium members get increased daily like, comment and follow limits compared to free users. The exact multiplier depends on your plan.
premium.faqLongPostQ: What is the long post feature?
premium.faqLongPostA: Standard posts are limited to a certain word count. With Premium, you can write much longer posts. The exact limit depends on your plan.
premium.faqVisitorsQ: What is the profile visitors feature?
premium.faqVisitorsA: It shows you who has visited your profile in the last 30 days. This feature is only available to Premium members.
premium.faqExpireA: When your Premium subscription ends, your account reverts to free features. Your verified badge is removed, daily limits return to free levels, and the analytics panel becomes inaccessible.
premium.faqAnnualQ: What is the annual plan advantage?
premium.faqAnnualA: Annual plans offer more affordable pricing per month compared to monthly plans. They also include all features of the plan without restriction.
premium.faqPaymentA: You can pay with credit/debit card through our secure payment infrastructure. All transactions are protected with 256-bit SSL encryption.
premium.faqAnalyticsQ: What can I see in the analytics panel?
premium.faqAnalyticsA: You can track views, likes, comments, saves, shares, follower growth, profile visitors and content performance in detail.
premium.faq2FAA: It is a method that adds a verification code via email in addition to your password. It is available to Premium subscribers.
premium.faqBusinessA: This is a feature exclusive to the Business plan. You can switch to a business account type, and add a category and contact button (email, phone) to your profile.
premium.defaultSubtitle: Choose the plan that suits you, start now.
premium.betaNotice: You are in the Beta Version
premium.needHelpDesc: For questions about Premium, you can write to our team or visit our help center.
